settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.content: We offer fast delivery across India. Orders are typically shipped within 24-48 hours and delivered in 3-7 business days. Free shipping is available on all prepaid orders.

settings.heading: The Kannauj Heritage
settings.content: Each drop of Mahekh attar is distilled using traditional copper pots (Degs) and clay receivers (Bhapkas) in Kannauj, the perfume capital of India. We source only the purest natural blossoms and ingredients.

settings.prefilled_text: Hello Mahekh, I would like to order the Mahekh Premium Attar Combo (Katcha Bela + Kesar Chandan + Mogra). Please assist me with my order!

settings.title: Fragrance Profile
settings.subtitle: Scent Anatomy
settings.top_note_desc: The opening notes provide a luxurious spicy warmth upon application.
settings.heart_note_desc: The core of the fragrance reveals elegant floral layers that smooth the spices.
settings.base_note_desc: The deep, rich foundation remains on your skin for hours with a warm, woody trail.
settings.best_suited: Special occasions, cool evenings, and ceremonial wear.

settings.subtitle: CRAFTSMANSHIP & ORIGINS
settings.title: How We Distill Our Premium Attars
settings.step_1_desc: Fresh rose, jasmine, or khus roots are hand-picked at dawn in Kannauj when the fragrance concentration is highest, and immediately sent to distillation.
settings.step_2_desc: Petals are mixed with water in copper pots (Degs), sealed tightly using clay and cotton ropes, and heated gently over a wood-fire furnace.
settings.step_3_desc: Fragrant vapor travels through bamboo pipes into cold clay receivers (Bhapkas) submerged in water. Scent is captured drop by drop in pure sandalwood base oil.

settings.title: How To Apply Concentrated Attar
settings.subtitle: LONGEVITY GUIDE
settings.step_1_desc: Apply the perfume oil directly to pulse points (wrists, inner elbows, neck, and behind ears). Body heat in these spots diffuses the scent naturally.
settings.step_2_desc: Gently dab the oil on your skin. Never rub wrists together, as rubbing friction breaks down the delicate top note molecules and reduces scent longevity.
settings.step_3_desc: Fragrance lasts significantly longer on moisturized skin. Apply an unscented moisturizer or lotion to pulse points before dabbing your attar.

settings.title: 100% Alcohol-Free
settings.text: Pure concentrated perfume oil that is gentle on your skin.

settings.title: Long Lasting
settings.text: Carefully selected ingredients that keep you fragrant all day long.

settings.title: Natural Craftsmanship
settings.text: Traditional steam distillation process (Deg-Bhapka) from Kannauj.

settings.title: Premium & Pure
settings.text: No animal testing, crafted with clean and authentic ingredients.

settings.quote: This Kasturi Attar has a soul. Its sillage is warm and projection is balanced. The packaging looks premium and fits a royal collection.
settings.author: Rohan Gupta

settings.quote: Pure concentrated oil without any sticky feeling. It lasts all day on clothes. Incredible craft from Kannauj.
settings.author: Anjali Sen

settings.quote: Very close to traditional sandalwood base. Free from alcohol, so it does not irritate my skin. 5 stars on quality.
settings.author: Vikram Singh
